causal_derived_features.absorption: large signed flow with signed price response of opposite sign or below the locked impact threshold
causal_derived_features.cross_asset: same decision-clock features for the other symbol, available simultaneously
causal_derived_features.impact_efficiency: signed log return divided by max(abs(quote imbalance), 0.05)
causal_derived_features.standardization: rolling median and MAD using only prior completed quarter-hour events for the same symbol and observation window

event_clock.decision_time: event_start + observation_window; only trades with exchange timestamps strictly before decision_time enter features
event_clock.entry: first complete Binance 1-minute open at or after decision_time + 1 second; this is normally event+60 seconds for W<60 and event+120 seconds for W=60

evidence_boundary.confirmation: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z/2026-01-01T00:00:00Z; forbidden until final IDs are frozen after selection
evidence_boundary.selection: 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z/2025-01-01T00:00:00Z; forbidden until a development candidate passes the locked gate

execution_and_accounting.funding: actual archived funding known at its application timestamp
execution_and_accounting.intraminute_ambiguity: stop before target; gap stop fills at first executable price; no same-minute re-entry
execution_and_accounting.mark_to_market: UTC daily liquidation-value equity including unrealized PnL and accrued funding
execution_and_accounting.variable_slippage: same causal one-minute volatility/volume/impact function already audited in sparse_engine

forbidden_after_registration: opening 2024 or 2025 after a development gate failure
changing event windows, thresholds, horizons, stops, costs, gate, or family direction after seeing outcomes
treating aggregate-trade timestamps as locally received times
using a trade stamped at or after the decision time in features
entering at an already-known favorable intra-minute price
selecting only one favorable symbol, side, month, or regime after outcomes
research_question: Do trade-level order-flow and price-impact features from the first seconds of UTC quarter-hours forecast executable BTCUSDT/ETHUSDT perpetual returns after conservative costs?

source.aggressor_sign: +1 when is_buyer_maker is false; -1 when true
source.archive: official data.binance.vision monthly aggTrades ZIP plus .CHECKSUM
source.integrity: every monthly ZIP SHA-256 must match its official .CHECKSUM; failures abort closed
source.months: 2021-10 through 2023-12 only for the development stage

CROSS_ASSET_SECONDS_LEAD_LAG.side: leader signed quote flow direction on the target symbol

QH_SECONDS_ABSORPTION_REVERSAL.side: opposite sign of signed quote flow
